title: eriogonum nortonii
intro: Eriogonum nortonii, also known as Norton's buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eriogonum nortonii include relief from arthritis, sore muscles, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum nortonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
